help.title: Quick Start for Skills Manager
help.description: The main flow is simple now: pick a scenario, install skills, then manage enablement and sync in My Skills.

scenarios.title: A scenario is a curated skill setup
scenarios.description: Use separate scenarios for work, learning, or open source so each flow keeps its own enabled skills.

switching.title: Switching scenarios also switches sync targets
switching.description: When you click a scenario, the app unsyncs the previous one and syncs the current scenario to detected agents.

install.title: Install from local, Git, or the market
install.description: Installed skills are stored in the central library and can be added to the current scenario immediately.

sync.title: Manage enablement and sync in My Skills
sync.description: Decide whether a skill belongs to the current scenario, then sync or unsync it for your agents.

settings.title: Use Settings for environment and preferences
settings.description: Check detected agents, change theme or language, set the default scenario, and reopen this guide from the Settings page.

mySkills.title: My Skills
mySkills.subtitle: {{count}} skills from the central library are enabled in “{{scenario}}”
mySkills.searchPlaceholder: Search skills in the central library...
mySkills.deleteConfirm: Delete skill "{{name}}" permanently? This removes its central library files, scenario links, and synced agent targets.
mySkills.addFirst: Click "Install Skills" to add skills into the central library
mySkills.noMatch: No skills match the current search or filter
mySkills.syncNothingToDo: This skill already covers every installed agent
mySkills.unsyncNothingToDo: This skill is not synced to any agent yet

install.title: Install Skills

noResults.title: No matching market skills
noResults.description: Try another keyword or clear the source filter.

local.title: Import a local skill source
local.description: Choose a folder that contains `SKILL.md`, or import a `.zip` or `.skill` package.

install.gitDesc: Enter a public or private Git repository URL. For private repos, ensure SSH keys are configured.
install.customNamePlaceholder: Leave blank to use repo name

scan.title: Scan Local Skills
scan.initial: Scan agent skill folders already present on this machine.
scan.summary: Scanned {{tools}} tool folders and found {{skills}} importable skills.
scan.noResultsHint: Everything may already be managed, or those tool folders do not contain skills yet.
scan.listHint: Existing local skills were found and can be imported directly into the central library.
scan.listImportedHint: Everything in this scan is already in the central library.

settings.title: Settings
settings.repoPathDesc: Default storage location for all Skills and scenario configs.
settings.syncModeDesc: Symlinks are recommended — minimal disk usage with live updates.
settings.currentScenarioDesc: Switch the app to another scenario and refresh active skills immediately.
settings.defaultScenarioDesc: Scenario loaded automatically on app launch.
settings.tagline: Cross-platform. Minimal, efficient, seamless multi-scenario switching.
settings.restartToApply: Update installed. Restart the app to apply.

common.dataOutOfDate: Some data could not be refreshed

scenario.name: Scenario Name
scenario.deleteConfirm: Delete scenario "{{name}}"? Skills will remain in the central repo.
